claim: The python-run gate can be bypassed via interpreter flags or versioned executables.
symptom: Unreviewed scripts can run by invoking `python -u script.py` or `python3.11 script.py`.
trigger: Any Bash command where python flags appear before the script or the interpreter is versioned (python3.X).

evidence.snippet:
m = re.search(r"\bpython(?:3)?(?:\.exe)?\s+(.+)", cmd)
rest = m.group(1).strip()
if rest.startswith("-c") or rest.startswith("-m") or rest.startswith("--") or rest.startswith("-h"): return None
first = rest.split()[0].strip("\"'")
if not first.endswith(".py"): return None
evidence.why_it_matters: Flags or python3.X prevent detection, so the gate returns None and allows execution.

fix_sketch: Use shlex.split, skip interpreter flags until the first non-flag token, and accept python3.X interpreter names.
test_gap: No tests cover flag-prefixed invocations or python3.X executables.
validator_reason: Regex only matches python/python3; flags before script cause .py check to fail, so gate returns None.

claim: The gate does not enforce the deep-script-review recency/modified-since requirement.
symptom: Stale PASS reviews allow running modified scripts without re-review.
trigger: A script changes after a PASS review or a review older than 30 days.

evidence.snippet: The review was written within the last 30 days (re-review if older or script modified since)
evidence.why_it_matters: The skill mandates freshness checks that the hook does not implement.

evidence.snippet:
ok, reason = review_passes(review)
if not ok: ...
return 0
evidence.why_it_matters: No timestamp or script-mtime comparison exists, so stale reviews pass.

fix_sketch: Compare review mtime and script mtime; block if review older than 30 days or script newer than review.
test_gap: No tests for stale review enforcement.
validator_reason: SKILL.md requires recency, but hook only checks PASS marker without mtime checks.

claim: The stop hook does not enforce all sections required by deep-pr-review SKILL.md.
symptom: A REVIEW_REPORT.md missing Base branch / Files reviewed / Confirmed findings can still pass the stop gate.
trigger: Deep review report missing those sections.

evidence.snippet: REVIEW_REPORT.md must contain sections: Scope reviewed, Base branch, Diff source, Files reviewed, Commands run, Subagents used, Confirmed findings, Verified-clean, Dropped candidate findings, Residual risk
evidence.why_it_matters: Skill mandates sections not enforced by the hook.

evidence.snippet: REQUIRED_SECTIONS = ["Scope reviewed", "Diff source", "Commands run", "Subagents used", "Verified-clean", "Dropped candidate findings", "Residual risk"]
evidence.why_it_matters: Base branch, Files reviewed, Confirmed findings are omitted, weakening enforcement.

fix_sketch: Add the missing sections to REQUIRED_SECTIONS to match SKILL.md.
test_gap: No tests ensure section list matches the skill spec.
validator_reason: SKILL.md requires sections absent from REQUIRED_SECTIONS list.

claim: SubagentStop gating deadlocks deep-pr-review: subagents cannot stop once review/ exists but final artifacts are missing.
symptom: Phase-3 reviewer subagents are blocked from stopping because stop_deep_review_gate.py exits 2 until Phase 7 artifacts exist.
trigger: Deep-pr-review run after Phase 0 creates review/ and before Phase 7 artifacts are written.

evidence.why_it_matters: Subagents will execute stop_deep_review_gate.py when stopping.

evidence.snippet:
if not REVIEW.exists() or not any(REVIEW.iterdir()): sys.exit(0)
... if missing: sys.exit(2)
evidence.why_it_matters: Once review/ exists but required artifacts are missing, the hook blocks all stops.

evidence.snippet: Phase 0: create review/ artifacts; Phase 3: spawn subagents; Phase 7: write final artifacts
evidence.why_it_matters: Subagents stop before Phase 7, so the stop gate can deadlock them.

fix_sketch: Remove SubagentStop hook or make stop_deep_review_gate.py ignore SubagentStop events until finalization.
test_gap: No tests cover subagent stop behavior during deep-pr-review phases.
validator_reason: SubagentStop hook runs the stop gate while required files are missing, blocking subagent termination.
